assertions.description: INCORRECT: The top-level 8IN14NixieShield.sch.json aggregates all sub-sheets. The same WS2812B daisy-chain miscount from tubes.sch propagates here: 8 chains of length 1 are reported instead of 1 chain of length 8. The 8 WS2812B LEDs D1-D8 in tubes.sch are explicitly wired in sequence and form one chain driven from the NEOPIXEL signal via a 100-ohm series resistor.
